sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ خُلُقٌ عَظِيمٌ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ وَالْجَنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost je plemenita osobina koja vodi ka dobročinstvu i Džennetu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait that leads to righteousness and Paradise.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: "عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ" [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Držite se iskrenosti, jer iskrenost vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet" [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu i održavanju rodbinskih veza].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (PBUH) said: 'Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtue and Joining Ties].

sentences.arabic: الْمُؤْمِنُ يَكُونُ صَادِقًا فِي كَلَامِهِ وَتِجَارَتِهِ وَمَعَ جَمِيعِ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik je iskren u svom govoru, trgovini i sa svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: A believer is truthful in his speech, his trade, and with all people.

sentences.arabic: الْكَذِبُ صِفَةٌ ذَمِيمَةٌ يَجِبُ أَنْ نَبْتَعِدَ عَنْهَا تَمَامًا.
sentences.translation: Laž je pokuđena osobina od koje se moramo potpuno udaljiti.
sentences.translationEn: Lying is a blameworthy trait that we must stay away from completely.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نَصْدُقُ، نَنَالُ مَحَبَّةَ اللهِ وَثِقَةَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ فِي الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Kada smo iskreni, stičemo Allahovu ljubav i povjerenje zajednice na ovome svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: When we are truthful, we gain the love of Allah and the trust of the community in this world.
